server.name: localhost
server.description: This is the server where Coolify is running on. Don't delete this!

proxy.last_saved_proxy_configuration:
name: coolify-proxy
networks:
  coolify:
    external: true
services:
  traefik:
    container_name: coolify-proxy
    image: 'traefik:v3.6'
    restart: unless-stopped
    extra_hosts:
      - 'host.docker.internal:host-gateway'
    networks:
      - coolify
    ports:
      - '80:80'
      - '443:443'
      - '443:443/udp'
      - '8080:8080'
    healthcheck:
      test: 'wget -qO- http://localhost:80/ping || exit 1'
      interval: 4s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 5
    volumes:
      - '/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro'
      - '/data/coolify/proxy/:/traefik'
    command:
      - '--ping=true'
      - '--ping.entrypoint=http'
      - '--api.dashboard=true'
      - '--entrypoints.http.address=:80'
      - '--entrypoints.https.address=:443'
      - '--entrypoints.http.http.encodequerysemicolons=true'
      - '--entryPoints.http.http2.maxConcurrentStreams=250'
      - '--entrypoints.https.http.encodequerysemicolons=true'
      - '--entryPoints.https.http2.maxConcurrentStreams=250'
      - '--entrypoints.https.http3'
      - '--providers.file.directory=/traefik/dynamic/'
      - '--providers.file.watch=true'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge=true'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.httpchallenge.entrypoint=http'
      - '--certificatesresolvers.letsencrypt.acme.storage=/traefik/acme.json'
      - '--api.insecure=false'
      - '--providers.docker=true'
      - '--providers.docker.exposedbydefault=false'
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.http.routers.traefik.entrypoints=http
      - traefik.http.routers.traefik.service=api@internal
      - traefik.http.services.traefik.loadbalancer.server.port=8080
      - coolify.managed=true
      - coolify.proxy=true

commit_message:
Add job edit page, fix auth guard, add AdStrip to video, redirect to profile after login

- Add /recruiter/jobs/[id]/edit page with pre-filled form and updateJobAndRedirect action
- Add updateJob + updateJobAndRedirect server actions to lib/jobs/actions.ts
- Fix auth guard on new job page: requireRecruiter -> requireOnboarded (any user can post)
- Add Edit button (Pencil icon) per job row on recruiter dashboard
- Add AdStrip component to video page for both eporner and creator_post branches
- Change post-login redirect from /explore to /app/professional/edit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ENTRYPOINT ["/bin/bash", "-l", "-c"]
WORKDIR /app/


COPY .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix
RUN nix-env -if .nixpacks/nixpkgs-ffeebf0acf3ae8b29f8c7049cd911b9636efd7e7.nix && nix-collect-garbage -d
RUN sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl wget

ARG ADMIN_EMAILS CI COOLIFY_BRANCH COOLIFY_FQDN COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID COOLIFY_URL NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL NIXPACKS_METADATA NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION NODE_ENV NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET NOWPAYMENTS_PUBLIC_KEY NOWPAYMENTS_SANDBOX NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
ENV ADMIN_EMAILS=$ADMIN_EMAILS CI=$CI COOLIFY_BRANCH=$COOLIFY_BRANCH COOLIFY_FQDN=$COOLIFY_FQDN COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID=$COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID COOLIFY_URL=$COOLIFY_URL NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=$NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL NIXPACKS_METADATA=$NIXPACKS_METADATA NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION=$NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION NODE_ENV=$NODE_ENV NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY=$NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET=$NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET NOWPAYMENTS_PUBLIC_KEY=$NOWPAYMENTS_PUBLIC_KEY NOWPAYMENTS_SANDBOX=$NOWPAYMENTS_SANDBOX NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=$NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=$SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY

# setup phase
# noop

# install phase
ENV NIXPACKS_PATH=/app/node_modules/.bin:$NIXPACKS_PATH
COPY . /app/.
RUN --mount=type=cache,id=nw6k9dxwp9zauab3wqvr36fc-/root/npm,target=/root/.npm npm install

# build phase
COPY . /app/.
RUN --mount=type=cache,id=nw6k9dxwp9zauab3wqvr36fc-next/cache,target=/app/.next/cache --mount=type=cache,id=nw6k9dxwp9zauab3wqvr36fc-node_modules/cache,target=/app/node_modules/.cache npm run build


RUN printf '\nPATH=/app/node_modules/.bin:$PATH' >> /root/.profile


# start
COPY . /app

CMD ["npm start"]","type":"stdout","timestamp":"2026-05-27T20:21:36.736476Z","hidden":true,"batch":14,"order":26},{"command":"docker exec trqf3uq61uobsgxepkig0oiv bash -c 'cat /artifacts/build.sh'","output":"cd /artifacts/trqf3uq61uobsgxepkig0oiv && set -a && source /artifacts/build-time.env && set +a && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build --add-host coolify:10.0.1.5 --add-host coolify-db:10.0.1.3 --add-host coolify-realtime:10.0.1.2 --add-host coolify-redis:10.0.1.4 --network host -f /artifacts/trqf3uq61uobsgxepkig0oiv/.nixpacks/Dockerfile --progress plain -t nw6k9dxwp9zauab3wqvr36fc:485865d00770a1bf1c2d5618b6208405b6c20d38 --build-arg CI --build-arg COOLIFY_BRANCH --build-arg COOLIFY_FQDN --build-arg COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID --build-arg COOLIFY_URL --build-arg NIXPACKS_METADATA --build-arg NIXPACKS_NODE_VERSION --build-arg NODE_ENV --build-arg NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL --build-arg NOWPAYMENTS_API_KEY --build-arg SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY --build-arg NOWPAYMENTS_IPN_SECRET --build-arg NOWPAYMENTS_SANDBOX --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY --build-arg NOWPAYMENTS_PUBLIC_KEY --build-arg ADMIN_EMAILS --build-arg COOLIFY_BUILD_SECRETS_HASH=5868db14f2e4e9846016cf404f78889e73efee01c97e986acac01665d28d606d --build-arg 'COOLIFY_URL' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_FQDN' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_BRANCH' --build-arg 'COOLIFY_RESOURCE_UUID' /artifacts/trqf3uq61uobsgxepkig0oiv","type":"stdout","timestamp":"2026-05-27T20:21:37.107548Z","hidden":true,"batch":15,"order":27},{"command":"docker exec trqf3uq61uobsgxepkig0oiv bash -c 'bash /artifacts/build.sh'","output":"#0 building with "default" instance using docker driver
